title: Angular & Node Developer
description:
Job description
SwissTech Unicorn Corp LLP is looking for Angular & Node Developer to join our dynamic team and embark on a rewarding career journey.Job Overview: A Node Developer is responsible for designing, developing, and implementing server-side applications using Node.js. They are responsible for writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code that powers web applications and services.
Duties and Responsibilities:
€¢ Design and develop server-side applications using Node.js and related technologies
€¢ Build reusable and testable code for future use and optimization
€¢ Implement data storage solutions using databases such as MongoDB or MySQL
€¢ Participate in code reviews and contribute to team-wide knowledge sharing and continuous improvement efforts
€¢ Identify and troubleshoot performance issues and bugs and work to improve the performance and stability of server-side applications
Requirements:
€¢ Minimum of 2 years of experience working as a Node.js developer
€¢ Strong knowledge of Node.js, as well as experience with Express.js or other Node.js frameworks
€¢ Proficiency with front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
€¢ Experience with web services, APIs, and RESTful APIs
€¢ Familiarity with database technologies such as MongoDB, MySQL, or PostgreSQL
€¢ Knowledge of code versioning tools such as Git
€¢ Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

title: Front-End JavaScript Developer
description:
Job description
Job description


Are you a passionate front-end/Javascript coder who loves to learn about new technologies as wellWe are looking for talented Javascript coders who can harness the power of diverse technologies to deliver outstanding solutions to our international clients.


You will work on international projects involving any or all of the following:
Build cutting edge applications using front-end frameworks like React, Angular, Vue.js, Svelte, Gatsby, Next.js, etc
Implement full-stack solutions using Node.js / MERN / MEAN / MEVN Stacks
Build reusable components and front-end libraries for future use
Translate designs and wire-frames into high-quality front-end code
Optimize components for maximum performance across a vast array of web-capable devices and browsers
Work in Linux and cloud environments
Use Docker, Git and other relevant tools.
Desired Candidate Profile:
At least 2 year of web development experience
Strong Javascript coding skills
In-depth knowledge of CSS, HTML and front end application architecture
Solid knowledge of Javascript frameworks like React, Vue.js and Angular would be an advantage
A love of learning and a commitment to build your skills long-term
A reliable nature with a helpful "can do" attitude
Honour and integrity
Good written English and eagerness to deliver high quality service to clients.
A computer running Windows 10, Linux or MacOS and reliable Internet access.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
Job description
Company Overview:
Stimulus Research Services is a forward-thinking organization dedicated to pushing boundaries in the digital space. We specialize in delivering innovative solutions that drive positive user experiences and measurable business growth for our global clients. As a small but dynamic team, we embrace new technologies and architectures to solve complex challenges and deliver exceptional results.

Position: Full Stack Developer

Objective:
We are seeking a talented Full Stack Developer who will take ownership of projects and drive them from conception to deployment. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in building scalable, distributed solutions across the full stack, with expertise in web frameworks, APIs, databases, and back-end languages. This role offers the opportunity to work on cutting edge projects and collaborate with a highly motivated team to create amazing experiences for our users.

Responsibilities:
• Participate in all aspects of agile software development, including design, implementation, and deployment.
• Architect end-to-end systems optimized for speed and scale, ensuring application performance, uptime, and reliability.
• Develop new features and infrastructure to support evolving business and project requirements.
• Lead new projects from conceptualization to deployment, ensuring high standards for code quality and application design.
• Collaborate with designers and front-end engineers to create reliable APIs and deliver seamless user experiences.
• Engage in cross-functional collaboration via Slack, GitHub, and video conferences to coordinate efforts and drive projects forward.

Required Skills and Qualifications:
• 4+ years of experience in full stack development, with a focus on building large-scale software applications.
• 3+ years of experience in Node.js, with proficiency in PHP/JAVA considered a plus.
• Working knowledge of TypeScript and familiarity with multiple front-end and back-end languages and frameworks.
• Experience designing and integrating RESTful APIs, and proficiency in version control, server management, and AWS.
• Strong debugging and optimization skills, with a commitment to unit and integration testing.
• Familiarity with databases (e.g., MySQL, MongoDB), web servers (e.g., Apache), and UI/UX design principles.
• Interest in learning new tools, languages, and workflows to stay at the forefront of technology.

Join us at Stimulus Research Services and be part of a collaborative team that thrives on innovation and excellence. If you're passionate about leveraging technology to solve complex challenges and deliver exceptional results, we'd love to hear from you.
